reason: Disabling IPv4 forwarding can break the functionality of the system if it is acting as a router, gateway, VPN concentrator, or running container networking (like Docker or Kubernetes) that relies on IP forwarding. While the sysctl change itself is low risk to the OS stability, the impact on network routing services requires verification.
estimated_impact: networking affected; Disruption of network routing/forwarding services; Potential breakage of container networking (Docker/Podman/K8s); Potential breakage of VPN or NAT functionality
